prestazioni: Replace the stock Rover K-Series 1.8L (K16 18K4F) engine with a fully built 1.8L K-Series (K16) featuring forged internals: Wiseco 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings, and a steel billet crankshaft. Pair with a custom camshaft profile from Piper Cams (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) and a Jenvey ITB (Individual Throttle Body) kit with 45mm throttle plates for linear throttle response.

Install a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (fabricated by Bell Auto Services) and a Tial 38mm external wastegate. Use a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR Performance) mounted in the front clamshell with a Davies Craig EWP115 electric water pump for cooling. Tune via a MoTeC M400 ECU with a custom flex-fuel map supporting E85.

Upgrade the stock S1 Elise chassis with a full bolt-in roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, MIG-welded) and a fully polybushed suspension setup: Ohlins DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 2-way rebound, and 16-way compression), SuperPro polybushings (front control arms, rear toe links), and spherical bearing upgrades for the rear wishbones (Rose Joints from Elise Parts). Fit with AP Racing CP5270 front brake calipers and 280mm discs, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Replace the stock front clamshell with a carbon fiber version from Elise Shop (pre-preg autoclave, 3K twill weave) and install a custom front splitter from BOSS F1 (3D-scanned for S1 Elise, 40mm overhang with integrated dive planes). Add a rear diffuser from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated brake ducting).

Fit a set of OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (16x7 ET40 front, 17x8.5 ET35 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (205/45/16 front, 245/40/17 rear). Use custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from Elise Parts to achieve a flush fitment with the fenders.

Apply a full vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Atomic Teal with a matte black roof and mirror caps. Add custom side skirts from Elise Parts (carbon fiber, bolt-on) and a rear wing from Vortex Automotive (dual-element, carbon fiber, adjustable angle). Install LED angel eye headlights (Hella 500 series) and sequential LED taillights (custom fabricated by LUX Automotive).
